personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for generating and refreshing news briefings.

personas.name: News Reactor
personas.description: User who accesses the news briefings.

actions: Fetch the Latest News from APIs using Google News API, The Hindu API, Economic Times API, Alpha Vantage API, ESPN API, CricInfo API, Google News API (Breaking Section), and IMD API.
Assign AI Avatars Per Genre using https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}.
Store Videos & Assign conv_id for User Retrieval.
Verify Video Status Before Publishing by calling https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}}.
flows.sub_goal: Ensure pre-synthesized news briefings are generated and stored for all users.

actions: Trigger the News Briefing Generation Flow (Flow 1).
Notify System That a New conv_id is Available.
flows.sub_goal: Refresh previous news briefings with new content every 3 hours.

flows.flow_name: User Accessing News Briefing (conv_id Handling Updated)
actions: First User Accesses SynthNews and receives a new conv_id.
Other Users Access SynthNews to retrieve the latest stored news videos.
Play AI-Generated News Briefings automatically in a specified order.
Retrieve News Videos Using conv_id for user continuity.
flows.sub_goal: Provide users with pre-synthesized news briefings seamlessly.
